papers.title: DexCap: Scalable and Portable Mocap Data Collection System for Dexterous Manipulation
papers.note: Multi-finger hand trained from mocap unscrews a bottle cap (uncapping); reports ~30% success with human-mocap-only data.

papers.title: EgoDex: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from Large-Scale Egocentric Video
papers.note: Dexterous policies learned from egocentric video include unscrewing a bottle cap among demonstrated behaviors.

papers.title: Twisting Lids Off with Two Hands
papers.note: Two multi-fingered hands coordinate to grasp a jar-like container with one hand and twist the lid off about its axis with the other (sim-to-real RL).

papers.title: Embodied AI with Two Arms: Zero-shot Learning, Safety and Modularity
papers.note: Bimanual robot stabilizes a screw-cap container and unscrews the lid; 58.3% of containers opened zero-shot.

papers.title: Planning for Multi-stage Forceful Manipulation
papers.note: Explicitly opens a push-and-twist child-proof bottle via planned forceful push-twist actions (grasp-twist, finger-twist, palm-twist, tool-twist).

papers.title: Towards Human-Level Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation with Reinforcement Learning
papers.note: Bi-DexHands includes an environment where two hands cooperate to hold a bottle and open its cap without dropping the cap.

tasks.en: open and close a toothpaste cap

papers.title: ManipTrans: Efficient Dexterous Bimanual Manipulation Transfer via Residual Learning
papers.note: Demonstrates 'opening the toothpaste': left hand holds the tube while the right hand's thumb and index finger pop open the small cap (DexManipNet).

papers.title: Benchmarking Reinforcement Learning Methods for Dexterous Robotic Manipulation with a Three-Fingered Gripper
papers.note: Three-fingered 9-DoF gripper rotates a sensorized target valve precisely 180 degrees via image-based RL.

papers.title: Rapid Motor Adaptation for Robotic Manipulator Arms
papers.note: Includes a Faucet Turning task where the agent pushes the handle with one finger to rotate it.

tasks.en: turn a door handle to open

papers.title: DoorBot: Closed-Loop Task Planning and Manipulation for Door Opening in the Wild with Haptic Feedback
papers.note: Haptic-aware closed-loop manipulation opens unseen doors with lever handles and doorknobs; success rate up to ~90%.

papers.title: A Versatile Door Opening System with Mobile Manipulator through Adaptive Position-Force Control and Reinforcement Learning
papers.note: Mobile manipulator turns handles and opens doors via adaptive position-force control and RL.

tasks.en: unlock a lock with a key

papers.title: ExoStart: Efficient learning for dexterous manipulation with sensorized exoskeleton demonstrations
papers.note: Dexterous hand inserts and turns a key in a lock (Key Lock task) with >50% success, learned from exoskeleton demos + RL.

tasks.en: tighten or loosen a screw with a screwdriver

papers.title: Haptics of Screwing and Unscrewing for its Application in Smart Factories for Disassembly
papers.note: Robotic screwdriving/unscrewing study modeling axial force and torque to avoid cam-out while driving screws with a screwdriver.

papers.title: SimToolReal: An Object-Centric Policy for Zero-Shot Dexterous Tool Manipulation
papers.note: Dexterous hand grasps a hammer by its handle, rotates it in-hand into striking pose, and hammers a nail (zero-shot sim-to-real).

papers.title: Tool-as-Interface: Learning Robot Policies from Observing Human Tool Use
papers.note: Imitation-learning framework validated on nail hammering (among other tool tasks) from human tool-use observation.

papers.title: ScissorBot: Learning Generalizable Scissor Skill for Paper Cutting via Simulation, Imitation, and Sim2Real
papers.note: Learning-based robotic system that cuts patterned paper with real scissors (sim-to-real).

papers.title: Scaling Cross-Embodied Learning: One Policy for Manipulation, Navigation, Locomotion and Aviation (CrossFormer)
papers.note: Cross-embodiment policy demonstrated uncapping a Sharpie pen on a bimanual robot.

papers.title: VLBiMan: Vision-Language Anchored One-Shot Demonstration Enables Generalizable Bimanual Robotic Manipulation
papers.note: Bimanual pen/cap assembly and uncapping tasks via one-shot demonstrations.

papers.title: Mana: Dexterous Manipulation of Articulated Tools
papers.note: Multi-fingered dexterous manipulation of articulated tools including picking up small objects with tongs.

papers.title: SCOOP'D: Learning Mixed-Liquid-Solid Scooping via Sim2Real Generative Policy
papers.note: Diffusion policy scoops liquids/granular media with a ladle-like tool, transferring scoops between containers.

papers.title: Tool-as-Interface: Learning Robot Policies from Human Tool Usage through Imitation Learning
papers.note: Includes a pan/spatula flipping task (eggs, burger buns, meat patties) learned from human play.

papers.title: Robot Learning as an Empirical Science: Best Practices for Policy Evaluation
papers.note: Dual-arm 'Flip and Serve Pancake' task with each arm holding a spatula to flip and plate a pancake.

tasks.en: tighten a nut with a wrench

papers.title: Hybrid Control for Robotic Nut Tightening Task
papers.note: Hierarchical force/position control for autonomous robotic nut tightening (wrench/socket tool use).

papers.title: Robust Planning for Multi-stage Forceful Manipulation
papers.note: Forceful manipulation planning including twisting a nut on a bolt with a grasped spanner/tool.

tasks.en: cut bread or fruit with a knife

papers.title: SliceIt! A Dual Simulator Framework for Learning Robot Food Slicing
papers.note: Real-to-sim-to-real framework for safely learning robot knife slicing of food items.

papers.title: Learning an Adaptive Cutting Policy for Multi-Material Objects
papers.note: RSS paper learning a knife cutting policy that adapts to multi-material objects (e.g., fruit/bread).

tasks.en: flip book pages one by one

papers.title: Flipbot: Learning Continuous Paper Flipping via Coarse-to-Fine Exteroceptive-Proprioceptive Exploration
papers.note: Singulates and flips paper-like deformable objects one at a time (page-flipping style task).

papers.title: Learning thin deformable object manipulation with a multi-sensory integrated soft hand
papers.note: Soft underactuated hand singulates and turns thin sheets/pages using tactile sensing.

tasks.en: pull a single tissue from a box

papers.title: PP-Tac: Paper Picking Using Tactile Feedback in Dexterous Robotic Hands
papers.note: Dexterous hand picks up single thin paper-like sheets via tactile feedback; closest to pulling a tissue.

papers.title: Learning Neural Force Manifolds for Sim2Real Robotic Symmetrical Paper Folding
papers.note: Robot folds sheets of paper in half using a learned force manifold from physics simulation.

tasks.en: open an envelope and take out a letter
peel a sticker and stick it
open and close a ziplock bag

papers.title: Functional Contour-following via Haptic Perception and Reinforcement Learning
papers.note: Robot closes a deformable ziplock bag's zipper via tactile (BioTac) haptic feedback and contextual-bandit RL; directly performs ziplock closing (T-Haptics 2018, no arXiv ID).

papers.title: Iterative Interactive Modeling for Knotting Plastic Bags
papers.note: Dual-arm robot adjusts a randomly-dropped plastic bag to a standing pose then runs learned primitives to tie/knot it (CoRL 2022; PMLR gao23a, no arXiv ID found).

papers.title: DexKnot: Generalizable Visuomotor Policy Learning for Dexterous Bag-Knotting Manipulation
papers.note: Learns a dexterous visuomotor policy that ties/knots plastic bags.

papers.title: A gripper for flap separation and opening of sealed bags
papers.note: Custom gripper separates and grasps the flaps of sealed flat pouches and opens the seal; closest real match (opening sealed bags, not literal tearing of a snack bag).

tasks.en: wrap an item in bubble wrap

papers.title: Learning-based Cooperative Robotic Paper Wrapping: A Unified Control Policy with Residual Force Control
papers.note: Bimanual cooperative robot wraps objects in paper/wrapping material via learned residual-force control; closest match to wrapping an item.

papers.title: Accurate Pouring with an Autonomous Robot Using an RGB-D Camera
papers.note: PR2 robot pours water into a cup to a target level using RGB-D liquid-level feedback; 250+ real pours.

papers.title: Robot gaining accurate pouring skills through self-supervised learning and generalization
papers.note: Self-supervised GRU policy pours precise water amounts into a cup on a real manipulator.

tasks.en: crack an egg into a bowl

papers.title: DexMan: Learning Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation from Human and Generated Videos
papers.note: Bimanual dexterous humanoid skills learned from videos; task suite includes egg cracking into a bowl.

papers.title: DexMimicGen: Automated Data Generation for Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation via Imitation Learning
papers.note: Automated bimanual dexterous data generation; includes delicate egg/bowl-style placement tasks.

papers.title: Goal-conditioned dual-action imitation learning for dexterous dual-arm robot manipulation
papers.note: Dual-arm robot peels a real banana end-to-end via goal-conditioned dual-action imitation learning.

papers.title: Mash, Spread, Slice! Learning to Manipulate Object States via Visual Spatial Progress
papers.note: Franka robot performs spreading of coatable substances on a surface (e.g. spread on bread/donut) using visual spatial-progress rewards.

tasks.en: put and remove toast from a toaster

papers.title: A Careful Examination of Large Behavior Models for Multitask Dexterous Manipulation
papers.note: TRI bimanual LBM evaluation suite includes toaster bread-loading / make-toast tasks; uncertain whether removal is explicitly performed.

papers.title: Vegetable Peeling: A Case Study in Constrained Dexterous Manipulation
papers.note: Allegro hand reorients a vegetable while a second arm peels/processes it; constrained dexterous food prep (closest to trimming/processing vegetables).

tasks.en: pick up noodles into a bowl

papers.title: Learning Bimanual Scooping Policies for Food Acquisition
papers.note: Franka robot acquires noodles (twirling/grouping with a fork) and scoops food into/off a plate; real-world noodle acquisition.

papers.title: DexUMI: Using Human Hand as the Universal Manipulation Interface for Dexterous Manipulation
papers.note: Dexterous hand grasps seasoning and sprinkles it over food (sprinkling salt task); closest match to shaking/sprinkling seasoning.

papers.title: Method for Bottle Opening with a Dual-Arm Robot
papers.note: Dual-arm TIAGo++ grips bottle and cap and unscrews/opens it using force control plus a deep-RL gripper-rotation policy (Biomimetics/MDPI; closest published robot-uncorking-type task).

tasks.en: thread a nut onto a bolt

papers.title: FORGE: Force-Guided Exploration for Robust Contact-Rich Manipulation under Uncertainty
papers.note: Sim-to-real force-aware RL whose multistage planetary-gear assembly explicitly includes a nut-threading (thread nut onto bolt) sub-task.

papers.title: Hybrid Control for Robotic Nut Tightening Task
papers.note: Autonomous nut-tightening system threading a nut onto a fixed bolt via a motion-primitive planner with force/position control switching.

papers.title: Robot, Feed Thyself: Plugging In to Unmodified Electrical Outlets
papers.note: Robot locates and inserts a plug into an unmodified wall outlet using electric-field sensing to align prongs with the socket holes.

papers.title: Precise and Dexterous Robotic Manipulation via Human-in-the-Loop Reinforcement Learning
papers.note: HIL-SERL: vision-based RL grasps a free USB connector and inserts it into the slot with near-perfect success.

papers.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Industrial Insertion Tasks with Visual Inputs and Natural Rewards
papers.note: Learns connector/USB-style industrial insertion from visual inputs with self-supervised rewards.

papers.title: A Lightweight and Transferable Design for Robust LEGO Manipulation
papers.note: Robot end-of-arm tool that robustly picks, places, and assembles (stacks/inserts) LEGO bricks onto target studs.

papers.title: Eye-in-Finger: Smart Fingers for Delicate Assembly and Disassembly of LEGO
papers.note: Tool-tip vision-in-finger enabling sub-millimeter robotic LEGO assembly and disassembly.

tasks.en: assemble a pen by inserting the refill

papers.title: Learning Fine-Grained Bimanual Manipulation with Low-Cost Hardware
papers.note: ACT/ALOHA includes a battery-slot task: one gripper places and pushes a battery into a remote-control slot against a spring while the other holds the remote.

papers.title: You Only Demonstrate Once: Category-Level Manipulation from Single Visual Demonstration
papers.note: Battery-insertion among its category-level contact-rich tasks: pick a battery and insert it into a spring-loaded receptacle.

papers.title: Jigsaw-based Benchmarking for Learning Robotic Manipulation
papers.note: Benchmark where a robot picks and inserts/fits jigsaw puzzle pieces into place as a manipulation task.

papers.title: ALOHA Unleashed: A Simple Recipe for Robot Dexterity
papers.note: First end-to-end bimanual diffusion policy that autonomously ties shoelaces (and hangs shirts) on ALOHA 2.

papers.title: ALOHA Unleashed: A Simple Recipe for Robot Dexterity
papers.note: Bimanual ALOHA learns to straighten shoelaces and tie them into a bow via diffusion-policy imitation learning.

papers.title: Self-Supervised Learning of Dynamic Planar Manipulation of Free-End Cables
papers.note: Robot dynamically manipulates and arranges free-end cables into goal configurations (coiling/organizing) via self-supervised learning.

papers.title: Autonomously Untangling Long Cables
papers.note: Bilateral robot manages and organizes cables up to 3m, including bringing them to a neat untangled arrangement.

papers.title: Untangling Dense Knots by Learning Task-Relevant Keypoints
papers.note: Bilateral robot untangles dense knots in cables/cords using learned task-relevant keypoints (HULK).

papers.title: Autonomously Untangling Long Cables
papers.note: Robot autonomously untangles knotted long cables with sliding-and-grasping primitives (SGTM).

tasks.en: tie a knot in a rope

papers.title: TieBot: Learning to Knot a Tie from Visual Demonstration through a Real-to-Sim-to-Real Approach
papers.note: Dual-arm robot ties a knot in a tie (deformable) from visual demo; 50% real-world success.

papers.title: Bimanual rope manipulation skill synthesis through context dependent correction policy learning from human demonstration
papers.note: Humanoid bimanual robot makes knots over a bar with rope via learned correction policy.

papers.title: Learning on the Job: Self-Rewarding Offline-to-Online Finetuning for Industrial Insertion of Novel Connectors from Vision
papers.note: Robot inserts/mates electrical connectors (50 connector types) via self-rewarding offline-to-online RL from vision.

papers.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Industrial Insertion Tasks with Visual Inputs and Natural Rewards
papers.note: Robot performs electric connector plug insertion (mating connector to socket) via deep RL with visual inputs.

papers.title: Teaching a single-arm robot to fold towels (synthetic-data keypoints)
papers.note: Single-arm robot folds towels using CNNs trained on synthetic data; Science Robotics (adm8151). arXiv id not confirmed.

papers.title: FabricFlowNet: Bimanual Cloth Manipulation with a Flow-based Policy
papers.note: Bimanual robot folds cloth/towels into target configurations using a flow-based policy.

papers.title: SpeedFolding: Learning Efficient Bimanual Folding of Garments
papers.note: Bimanual robot folds crumpled garments (incl. T-shirts) to folded state, 93% success.

papers.title: UniFolding: Towards Sample-efficient, Scalable, and Generalizable Robotic Garment Folding
papers.note: Robot unfolds and folds T-shirts/garments via sample-efficient human-in-the-loop learning.

tasks.en: hang a shirt on a hanger

papers.title: ALOHA Unleashed: A Simple Recipe for Robot Dexterity
papers.note: Bimanual robot picks a hanger, inserts both sides into shirt collar, and hangs the shirt on a rack.

papers.title: RoboHanger: Learning Generalizable Robotic Hanger Insertion for Diverse Garments
papers.note: Robot inserts a hanger into diverse garments (hanging a shirt on a hanger) with a generalizable learned policy.

papers.title: Contact-Rich Manipulation of a Flexible Object based on Deep Predictive Learning using Vision and Tactility
papers.note: Robot performs contact-rich unzipping of a fabric bag's zipper via deep predictive learning with vision and tactile.

papers.title: SpeedFolding: Learning Efficient Bimanual Folding of Garments
papers.note: Bimanual system folds crumpled garments (incl. socks-class flat items) into folded configurations.

papers.title: UniFolding: Towards Sample-efficient, Scalable, and Generalizable Robotic Garment Folding
papers.note: Dual-arm garment unfolding and folding pipeline for deformable clothing.

tasks.en: hang laundry on a drying rack

papers.title: RoboHanger: Learning Generalizable Robotic Hanger Insertion for Diverse Garments
papers.note: Bimanual policy inserts a hanger into garments (the core skill for hanging laundry on a rack).

papers.title: GraphGarment: Learning Garment Dynamics for Bimanual Cloth Manipulation Tasks
papers.note: Learns garment dynamics and applies them to bimanual manipulation tasks including hanging.

tasks.ko: 한 손 잡고+다른 손 뚜껑 열기
tasks.en: hold an object and open its cap

papers.title: VTAO-BiManip: Masked Visual-Tactile-Action Pre-training with Object Understanding for Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation
papers.note: Bimanual dexterous bottle-cap unscrewing: one hand holds the bottle, the other unscrews the cap (sim + real).

papers.title: Method for Bottle Opening with a Dual-Arm Robot
papers.note: Dual-arm TIAGo++ grips bottle with one gripper, cap with the other, unscrews via position+force control (MDPI Biomimetics, no arXiv).

papers.title: Robot Cooking with Stir-fry: Bimanual Non-prehensile Manipulation of Semi-fluid Objects
papers.note: Bimanual leader-follower system: one arm holds/handles the pan/contents while the other stirs.

tasks.en: hold paper and cut with scissors

papers.title: ScissorBot: Learning Generalizable Scissor Skill for Paper Cutting via Simulation, Imitation, and Sim2Real
papers.note: Dual-arm cooperation: one arm holds/rotates the paper, the other manipulates scissors to cut.

tasks.en: hold a nail and hammer it

tasks.ko: 큰 상자 두 손으로 들어 옮기기
tasks.en: lift a large box with two hands

papers.title: PerAct2: Benchmarking and Learning for Robotic Bimanual Manipulation Tasks
papers.note: Bimanual benchmark with coordinated two-arm lifting/box-pushing tasks requiring simultaneous arm coordination.

tasks.en: carry a tray with two hands

papers.title: You Only Teach Once: Learn One-Shot Bimanual Robotic Manipulation from Video Demonstrations
papers.note: Bimanual tasks include pouring water (one arm holds, the other pours) learned one-shot from video.

papers.title: DexCap: Scalable and Portable Mocap Data Collection System for Dexterous Manipulation
papers.note: Bimanual dexterous-hand robot executes pouring among its evaluated manipulation tasks.

tasks.en: hand over an object between two hands

papers.title: Dynamic Handover: Throw and Catch with Bimanual Hands
papers.note: Two Allegro hands on XArms throw and catch objects between hands via multi-agent RL with sim-to-real; covers passing an object from one hand to the other.

papers.title: DyDexHandover: Human-like Bimanual Dynamic Dexterous Handover using RGB-only Perception
papers.note: Bimanual dynamic handover where one dexterous hand transfers an object to the other using RGB-only perception.

papers.title: Catch It! Learning to Catch in Flight with Mobile Dexterous Hands
papers.note: Mobile manipulator with 12-DoF dexterous hand learns to throw and catch objects in flight via two-stage RL.

papers.title: DexCatch: Learning to Catch Arbitrary Objects with Dexterous Hands
papers.note: End-to-end model-free RL framework (LTC) for throwing-then-catching arbitrary objects with dexterous hands.

tasks.en: roll a ball between two hands

papers.title: Dynamic Handover: Throw and Catch with Bimanual Hands
papers.note: Two facing dexterous hands pass objects back and forth; closest match to rolling/passing a ball between two hands (bimanual coordination).

tasks.en: reposition a heavy object with both hands

papers.title: A Certified-Complete Bimanual Manipulation Planner
papers.note: Plans bimanual pick-and-place for large/heavy objects that can only be moved when grasped with both hands, repositioning from initial to goal placement.

papers.title: Bimanual Grasp Synthesis for Dexterous Robot Hands
papers.note: Bimanual grasping for handling heavy objects, with two-hand strategies outperforming single-hand for repositioning.

papers.title: Learning Dexterous In-Hand Manipulation
papers.note: OpenAI Shadow Hand reorients a cube to arbitrary target orientations via RL trained in sim with domain randomization, transferred to real hardware.

papers.title: DROP: Dexterous Reorientation via Online Planning
papers.note: Online sampling-based predictive control for contact-rich in-hand cube reorientation with vision-based pose estimation.

papers.title: Lessons from Learning to Spin "Pens"
papers.note: First learning-based approach to spin pen-like objects in the fingers, achieving multiple revolutions with smooth finger gaiting.

papers.title: Soft Robotic Dynamic In-Hand Pen Spinning
papers.note: SWIFT system learns dynamic pen spinning with a soft robotic hand from real-world data; generalizes to brush and screwdriver.

tasks.en: roll a ball in the palm

papers.title: Getting the Ball Rolling: Learning a Dexterous Policy for a Biomimetic Tendon-Driven Hand with Rolling Contact Joints
papers.note: RL policy rolls/rotates a sphere in the Faive Hand with zero-shot sim-to-real transfer (in-palm ball rolling).

papers.title: Sampling-Based Model Predictive Control for Dexterous Manipulation on a Biomimetic Tendon-Driven Hand
papers.note: Demonstrates ball rolling, flipping, and catching in sim and on a physical biomimetic hand.

papers.title: Geometric In-Hand Regrasp Planning: Alternating Optimization of Finger Gaits and In-Grasp Manipulation
papers.note: Planner that moves from an initial grasp to a desired grasp using finger gaiting plus in-grasp manipulation (in-hand regrasping).

papers.title: Robotic in-hand manipulation with relaxed optimization
papers.note: Path planner executing both re-grasping and finger-gaiting actions to change the grasp in hand.

papers.title: In-Hand Manipulation of Articulated Tools with Dexterous Robot Hands with Sim-to-Real Transfer
papers.note: Dexterous in-hand manipulation/reorientation of articulated tools with tactile-force feedback and sim-to-real transfer.

papers.title: Object-Centric Dexterous Manipulation from Human Motion Data
papers.note: Learns object-centric dexterous in-hand reorientation including tool-like objects from human motion data.

papers.title: Precise Robotic Needle-Threading with Tactile Perception and Reinforcement Learning
papers.note: T-NT: vision-based tactile sensors locate the thread tail-end, then tactile-guided RL inserts the thread into the needle eyelet.

tasks.en: insert a coin into a slot

papers.title: DEXOP: A Device for Robotic Transfer of Dexterous Human Manipulation
papers.note: Hand-exoskeleton perioperation system; demonstrated tasks include picking up a coin from a table and retrieving an M2 screw (coin handling, not slot-insertion specifically).

tasks.en: turn a tiny screw by hand

papers.title: Dexterous In-Hand Manipulation of Slender Cylindrical Objects through Deep Reinforcement Learning with Tactile Sensing
papers.note: Three-fingered tactile hand rotates/repositions a thin cylindrical object (stick) in-hand via finger contacts; nearest analog to finger-turning a small screw/cylinder. Not a literal screw-in-thread task.

tasks.en: pick a small part with tweezers

papers.title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Articulated Tool Manipulation with Multifingered Hand
papers.note: Multifingered hand actuates a tweezer-like articulated tool to grasp/pick small objects of varying size (70.8% success).

tasks.en: move beans or grains one by one

papers.title: In-Hand Singulation and Scooping Manipulation with a 5 DOF Tactile Gripper
papers.note: Tactile (GelSight) gripper singulates individual objects buried in granular media by touch (84% success); closest match to picking grains one at a time.

tasks.en: pick a single card from a deck

papers.title: In-Hand Singulation and Scooping Manipulation with a 5 DOF Tactile Gripper
papers.note: Same gripper scoops/picks a single thin card (credit card) from a stack in confined space (100% success on card scooping).

papers.title: Learning thin deformable object manipulation with a multi-sensory integrated soft hand
papers.note: Soft underactuated hand singles out and picks thin deformable objects (pages/cards) using multi-sensory feedback.

papers.title: In-Hand Manipulation of Articulated Tools with Dexterous Robot Hands with Sim-to-Real Transfer
papers.note: Dexterous hand grasps and actuates articulated tools (scissors, pliers, staplers, surgical instruments) by pressing/squeezing the trigger; same problem class as pressing a spray pump.

papers.title: DexTOG: Learning Task-Oriented Dexterous Grasp with Language
papers.note: Shadow-hand task-oriented grasps explicitly include 'spray bottle pressing' and 'spray bottle triggering' (finger positioned to press button/pull trigger).

papers.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Tactile Robotics: Learning to Type on a Braille Keyboard
papers.note: RL agent learns to press/type characters on a (braille) keyboard, demonstrated in sim and on a real tactile robot.

papers.title: RoboPianist: Dexterous Piano Playing with Deep Reinforcement Learning
papers.note: Two anthropomorphic hands press sequences of keys on a keyboard (piano) via RL; closest dexterous key-pressing match.

tasks.en: open a drawer and place an item inside

papers.title: Bi-ACT: Bilateral Control-Based Imitation Learning via Action Chunking with Transformer
papers.note: Includes a 'Put-in-Drawer' task: robot opens a drawer and places an object inside via bilateral-control imitation learning.

tasks.en: open a case and take out glasses

papers.title: DexMan: Learning Bimanual Dexterous Manipulation from Human and Generated Videos
papers.note: Bimanual dexterous skills from videos (OakInk-v2 / TACO objects) include opening a case/container and removing a contained object such as glasses.

tasks.en: put on and take off a lens cap

papers.title: RoboCat: A Self-Improving Generalist Agent for Robotic Manipulation
papers.note: Generalist agent whose real-robot task suite includes stacking cups (and stacking objects/blocks).

papers.title: You Only Teach Once: Learn One-Shot Bimanual Robotic Manipulation from Video Demonstrations
papers.note: YOTO bimanual one-shot tasks include stacking cups; arxiv id not confirmed.

papers.title: Mastering Stacking of Diverse Shapes with Large-Scale Iterative Reinforcement Learning on Real Robots
papers.note: DeepMind RGB-Stacking: real robot arm stacks objects/blocks via large-scale RL.

papers.title: RoboCat: A Self-Improving Generalist Agent for Robotic Manipulation
papers.note: Performs block-stacking benchmark (stacking objects into a tower) among many tasks.

papers.title: A Deep Learning-Based Autonomous Robot Manipulator for Sorting Application
papers.note: Robot manipulator detects object color and sorts objects by color via deep learning vision + grasping.

papers.title: Multi-Stage Book Perception and Bimanual Manipulation for Rearranging Book Shelves
papers.note: Bimanual system perceives books and places/inserts a book onto a shelf (Springer chapter; no arxiv id found).
